\tzpentry{ID5859}{Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5859 introduces Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \int_V (\mathbf{J}\times\mathbf{B} - \rho\,\boldsymbol{\Omega}\times\mathbf{v})\,dV = 0, \]
